subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet that hath been sent down from the presence of the Mighty, the Wise, and beareth glad tidings unto mankind on this Day whereon He hath ascended the throne [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح قد نزل من لدن عزیز حکیم و یبشر الناس فی هذا الیوم الذی استوی فیه
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @Shrines and Holy places, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @knowledge; recognition of God
